remediation.description: Disable external auto-forwarding via transport rule or remove individual inbox forwarding rules.
remediation.script:
# Disable forwarding per mailbox:
Set-Mailbox -Identity <user> -DeliverToMailboxAndForward $false -ForwardingSmtpAddress $null
# Block external forwarding org-wide via transport rule
